entity.summary: Self-described global cryptocurrency exchange operating since 2023 and combining centralized trading with Web3 wallet access.
entity.notes: Independent exchange data places Bitcointry's establishment in 2023 and reports Seychelles registration under Devcode Technology. HEI retains Global as the origin because the reviewed accessible official surface describes global operations but does not independently establish a canonical domicile. January 1 is used as a year-level date placeholder.

events.title: Bitcointry exchange established
events.description: Bitcointry began operating as a cryptocurrency exchange in 2023.
events.notes: The reviewed independent profile establishes the year but not the exact day, so January 1 is used as a year-level date placeholder.

evidence.title: Bitcointry official website
evidence.notes: Official domain verifies the current Bitcointry identity and active exchange interface.

evidence.title: CoinPaprika exchange reference for Bitcointry
evidence.notes: Independent exchange directory reference corroborates the Bitcointry identity.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for Bitcointry
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile identifies Bitcointry as established in 2023. Its Seychelles registration information is noted but does not override the retained Global origin without accessible official corroboration.
